steps.title: Rewrite using the negative exponent rule
steps.content:
A negative exponent means the reciprocal. Apply this to rewrite the function:
$$f(x) = 4x^{-1} = \frac{4}{x}$$

steps.title: Substitute x = 21
steps.content: Evaluate the function at $x = 21$: $$f(21) = \frac{4}{21}$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
